detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 國際會展英文 (English for international MICE)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Students will discover and evaluate formal English business terminology, idioms, and expressions relating to conference management and business meeting protocols, in an international environment, by: 1. expanding their vocabulary to include American (and other) expressions commonly used in different aspects of international trade show; 2. analyzing the overview of purpose of international trade show and the complexity of the needs involved; 3. recognizing different problems in conference/ trade show management, developing sound strategies and creating solutions; 4. establishing a variety of entertainment options during free time of the attendees/guests 


2.教學綱要
A discussion of management of the specific challenges relating to tradeshows and exhibitions, including design, construction, and execution. Logistics for planning special events including registration operations, crowd control, security, risk management, speakers, and A/V. Overview of the components of the hospitality market in relation to the Expo/Tradeshow industry. Discussion of current issues facing Conventions/Exhibitions, Vendors/Suppliers, Sponsors, volunteers, and Convention Services Managers. Discussions of current industry trends and related career options. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : 自編教材　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Coursework will be weighted as follows: Attendance & Participation 15% In-Class Learning sheet & peer reviews 15% 2 Homework 15% In-pair in-class presentation 20% Mid-term Exam (Dictation) 25% Final Exam (Dictation) 25%  
1. No smart phone allowed in case you are permitted in taking it out. 2. Self-respect at all aspects. 3. Late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with me. 
Extra credit with blue card for : 1. early bird 2. active learners with volunteer 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG8 合適的工作及經濟成長


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
